remarks: Welcome to 150 Wildwood Road, an exceptional new construction residence that perfectly blends timeless colonial architecture with modern sophistication. Set on 1.12 private acres in one of Stamford's most sought-after neighborhoods, this 9,349-square-foot masterpiece showcases superior craftsmanship and thoughtful design by a respected local builder known for quality and attention to detail. This modern colonial offers four fully finished levels of luxurious living space, designed for both everyday comfort and elegant entertaining. From the moment you enter, you're greeted by a 2-story foyer, sun-filled open spaces, and exquisite mill work throughout. The main level features a grand foyer, expansive family room/EIK with custom fireplaces, formal dining rm, living room with custom fireplace & a gourmet chef's kitchen with Thermador appliances, custom cabinetry, and a generous center island - all opening to a light-filled breakfast area and spacious family room that lead to the huge deck overlooking backyard. The serene primary suite includes a walkout balcony, huge walk-in closet, and a master bath with massive curbless shower and his and hers sinks. 3 other bedrooms on 2nd floor with private baths. The 2nd fl offers an office space. The finished third floor offers flexible space for a playroom, home gym, or guest suite, while the fully finished walkout ll provides endless possibilities spaces includ. full bath & fireplace. Irrigation system installed. Agent related to owner
